one_law: Repo-local integrator state is the writeable coordination truth for NOOS local agents; home mirror and Supabase are read replicas unless an explicit operator promotes them.
rules: Agents must register before claiming work.
Every claimed task should declare scope_files when code paths are known.
An agent must not claim a task whose scope overlaps an active non-stale task owned by another agent.
Every mutating command writes the repo-local runtime state and a home mirror for other IDEs/worktrees on the same Mac.
Supabase mirror is optional and should be enabled only when service-role access is available.
